user.title: Phoenix AI Trader
user.description: Configure virtual paper trading. Phoenix will automatically create the required dashboard, sensors and data files.

data_description.data_dir: Local folder where Phoenix stores the virtual portfolio data.
data_description.activation_code: Leave empty to use the 24-hour trial.
data_description.telegram_service: Example: notify.telegram. It must match the notify service configured in Home Assistant.
data_description.alert_threshold_eur: Phoenix sends an alert when profit or loss exceeds this value.
data_description.alert_cooldown_hours: Prevents repeated notifications from being sent too close together.

error.cannot_create_files: Cannot create files in the selected folder. Check the path and permissions.
error.invalid_start_capital: Initial capital must be greater than zero.
error.invalid_target_capital: Target capital must be greater than initial capital.
error.invalid_duration: Duration must be greater than zero.
error.invalid_telegram_service: Telegram service must use a valid format, for example notify.telegram.
error.invalid_alert_cooldown: Minimum time between alerts must be at least 1 hour.

abort.already_configured: Phoenix AI Trader is already configured for this data folder.

init.title: Configure Phoenix AI Trader
init.description: Edit virtual capital, mission, license, Telegram notifications and alert thresholds. The data folder remains the one selected during installation.

data_description.activation_code: Leave empty to continue using the 24-hour trial.
data_description.alert_threshold_eur: Phoenix sends an alert when profit or loss exceeds this value.
data_description.alert_cooldown_hours: Prevents repeated notifications from being sent too close together.

error.cannot_create_files: Cannot update Phoenix data files. Check the path and permissions.
error.invalid_start_capital: Initial capital must be greater than zero.
error.invalid_target_capital: Target capital must be greater than initial capital.
error.invalid_duration: Duration must be greater than zero.
error.invalid_telegram_service: Telegram service must use a valid format, for example notify.telegram.
error.invalid_alert_cooldown: Minimum time between alerts must be at least 1 hour.
